overview:
## Overview

Structure used to encode information about each isoc frame that is processed at hardware interrupt time (low latency).

items.description: Returns status associated with the frame.
items.name: frStatus

items.description: Input specifiying how many bytes to read or write.
items.name: frReqCount

items.description: Time stamp that indicates time when frame was procesed.
items.name: frTimeStamp

items.description: A structure for encoding information about each low-latency isochronous frame.
items.name: IOUSBLowLatencyIsocFrame

title: IOUSBLowLatencyIsocFrame
